diagnoses.name: Acute decompensated heart failure with pulmonary edema
diagnoses.evidence_span: Acute decompensated heart failure with pulmonary edema

diagnoses.name: Atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary arteries
diagnoses.evidence_span: atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary arteries

diagnoses.name: Hypoxemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: demonstrated significant hypoxemia requiring supplemental oxygen

diagnoses.name: Acute hypotension
diagnoses.evidence_span: developed acute hypotension requiring vasopressor support

diagnoses.name: New-onset atrial fibrillation
diagnoses.evidence_span: patient experienced new-onset atrial fibrillation which was treated with antiarrhythmic therapy

diagnoses.name: Acute posthemorrhagic anemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: pt sustained acute posthemorrhagic anemia during hospitalization, likely related to procedural blood loss

diagnoses.name: Ulcerative colitis
diagnoses.evidence_span: remote history of ulcerative colitis, now managed via colostomy status following previous surgical intervention

diagnoses.name: Hyperlipidemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: hyperlipidemia, both controlled on current medical regimens

diagnoses.name: Postprocedural complications related to the circulatory system
diagnoses.evidence_span: patient developed postprocedural complications related to the circulatory system, including persistent hypotension requiring aggressive fluid resuscitation and vasopressor support

procedures.name: Cardiac output monitoring with continuous assessment
procedures.evidence_span: pt underwent cardiac output monitoring with continuous assessment throughout admission

procedures.name: Coronary artery bypass grafting (CABG) via open approach
procedures.evidence_span: he proceeded to coronary artery bypass grafting via open approach

procedures.name: Bypass to three coronary arteries from the aorta using autologous venous tissue
procedures.evidence_span: bypass to three coronary arteries from the aorta using autologous venous tissue

procedures.name: Bypass to one coronary artery from the left internal mammary artery
procedures.evidence_span: bypass to one coronary artery from the left internal mammary artery

procedures.name: Left saphenous vein harvest via percutaneous endoscopic approach
procedures.evidence_span: left saphenous vein was harvested via percutaneous endoscopic approach for graft material
